understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto all goal tiles at the same time before steps run out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3 pixels per step along a grid; walls and edges block movement, and pushable objects can be shoved ahead. CLICK changes focus to another selectable piece using its pixel coordinates. The semantic grid and blocked hints give partial information, but only actions reveal exact behaviors. The step budget is per-level and exhausting it ends the run.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto all goal tiles at the same time before steps run out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3 pixels per step along a grid; walls and edges block movement, and pushable objects can be shoved ahead. CLICK changes focus to another selectable piece using its pixel coordinates. The semantic grid and blocked hints give partial information, but only actions reveal exact behaviors. The step budget is per-level and exhausting it ends the run.
